name: development/code-smell
description: Detect code smells: raw Commands.execute, any casts, god classes, missing accessors, type violations. Uses Generator SDK audit + grep patterns.

params.name: category
params.description: Filter by smell category: any-casts, raw-execute, god-class, missing-accessor, all (default: all)

params.name: path
params.description: Limit scan to a specific directory path relative to src/

params.name: fix
params.description: Auto-fix where possible (e.g. add missing static accessors)

params.name: verbose
params.description: Show individual file-level details instead of summary

results.name: categories
results.description: Smells grouped by category with counts and file locations

examples.expectedResult: Returns all code smells across the codebase
Auto-fixes what it can (e.g. missing accessors)
